channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Kingdom Come Deliverance 2 Director Says It Did Gay Romance "Right" By Not Going "Woke" - GameSpot
item.description:
1. Kingdom Come Deliverance 2 Director Says It Did Gay Romance "Right" By Not Going "Woke"  GameSpot
  2. Kingdom Come Lead Celebrates LGBTQ+ Award By Calling Out "Forced Woke Nonsense"  OpenCritic
  3. Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 Lead Says His LGBTQ+ Award Nom Isn't "Woke"  TechRaptor
  4. Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 director "really proud" the gay romance he pushed for, which is somehow totally different to "woke" games' representation, is up for awards  Rock Paper Shotgun
  5. Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 chief "really proud" of LGBT Gayming Awards nom, insists Henry and Hans' gay romance isn't "woke" like other RPGs  GamesRadar+

item.title: Samsung unveils a new kid-friendly Galaxy Tab with a surprising feature - PhoneArena
item.description:
1. Samsung unveils a new kid-friendly Galaxy Tab with a surprising feature  PhoneArena
  2. Samsung's latest Galaxy Tab for your kids could outlast their childhood  Android Authority
  3. Samsung’s new kids tablet adds $100 for parental controls and a bouncy case  Yahoo Tech
  4. Galaxy Tab A11+ Kids Edition Makes Learning Safer, Smarter, and a Lot More Fun  samsung.com
  5. Samsung wants its newest tablet to grow up with your kids  MakeUseOf

item.title: Save up to 90% on Spike Chunsoft Games During the Spike Chunsoft Spring Sale on Nintendo eShop April 17 to April 29, 2026 - Spike Chunsoft
item.description:
1. Save up to 90% on Spike Chunsoft Games During the Spike Chunsoft Spring Sale on Nintendo eShop April 17 to April 29, 2026  Spike Chunsoft
  2. Bandai Namco kicks off Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch sale with Dragon Ball: Sparking Zero, Ni no Kuni, and more at new low prices  Nintendo Everything
  3. 2026 Devolver Digital April Sale Discounts 18 Nintendo Switch Games  Nintendo Insider
  4. Nintendo eShop game sale from $12: Dave The Diver for Switch 2, Hades II, much more  9to5Toys
  5. 69 Switch 1 & 2 Games To Check Out In Nintendo's 'Spotlight Sale' (North America)  Nintendo Life
